title: StartupLive'26 ViennaUP
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstrasse 11, 1030, Vienna
descriptionFull:
Two Days. Limitless Potential. One Transformational Experience.

Join StartupLive’26 ViennaUP and immerse yourself in two days of innovation, collaboration, and competition within Vienna’s dynamic startup ecosystem.

Whether you’re a founder with a bold idea or a professional in tech, design, marketing, or business, this is your opportunity to build something meaningful alongside ambitious creators and experienced mentors.

Day 1 focuses on connection and creation. Founders deliver fast-paced 90-second pitches, followed by focused workshops and mentoring to refine business models, sharpen strategy, and strengthen startups.

Day 2 focuses on refinement and performance, with pitch training and financing workshops, followed by live competition in front of investors and corporate leaders.

Professionals (attendees) are invited to contribute their skills and co-create with early-stage founders. Startups gain direct access to mentors, investors, and Vienna’s startup ecosystem.

Visitors are welcome to join the final pitch event and experience the future of entrepreneurship live.

Tickets Attendee Are you an experienced professional, industry expert, corporate leader, student, or early-stage founder looking to immerse yourself in the startup world? At StartupLive, you have the unique opportunity to join a startup team for two days, collaborate on real challenges, and pitch alongside them. Bring your expertise, creativity, and strategic insights to help early-stage startups refine their business models and accelerate growth. Whether you’re exploring entrepreneurship, seeking innovation-driven collaborations, gaining hands-on experience, or eager to share your knowledge, this is your chance to make a meaningful impact and connect with the next generation of founders. No matter your background, StartupLive is where learning meets execution and where ideas turn into action. title: Europe Tech Hackathon
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Foyer 1 Ecke, Lassallestraße, Joseph-Roth-Gasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
The Europe Tech Hackathon is an intensive, hands-on innovation experience for people who want to turn ideas into real impact. In Vienna, interdisciplinary teams work on concrete sustainability challenges using technology, AI and data.

Throughout the hackathon, participants benefit from experienced mentors from tech, business and sustainability who actively support teams in sharpening ideas, validating assumptions and building functional prototypes. The results are presented to a professional jury of industry and innovation experts, who provide honest, constructive feedback focused on impact, feasibility and scalability.

More than a competition, the Europe Tech Hackathon is a unique experience: intense collaboration, rapid learning, strong community spirit and the energy of creating something meaningful together. Join if you want to build, learn and connect.

Challenge Tracks Wähle deine Herausforderung. Challenge 1 · Partnered Fake News & Media Literacy Fake News und Desinformation gefährden die demokratische Öffentlichkeit in Europa. Entwickle ein KI-Tool, das Falschinformationen erkennt, Quellen bewertet und Medienkompetenz fördert, in Partnerschaft mit dem Bund Europäischer Jugend (BEJ) . Zur BEJ-Plattform Challenge Partner Bund Europäischer Jugend Challenge 2 Circular Product Data Wie können Produktdaten automatisch erhoben, strukturiert und als Digitaler Produktpass verfügbar gemacht werden? Challenge 3 Battery Lifecycle State-of-Health-Modelle, Wiederverkaufswert-Prognosen und EU-konforme Batteriepass-Lösungen für E-Bikes und Fahrzeuge. Challenge 4 ESG Automation KI-gestützte Extraktion von CO₂-Daten aus Rechnungen, PDFs und Lieferantenanfragen, für automatisierte Nachhaltigkeitsberichte. Bewertungskriterien Was die Jury bewertet Technologie 30% Qualität, Innovation und Umsetzbarkeit der technischen Lösung. Problem-Fit 20% Wie gut adressiert die Lösung das gewählte Challenge-Problem? Design & UX 15% Nutzbarkeit, Intuitivität und visuelle Qualität der Lösung. Business Model 15% Skalierbarkeit, Monetarisierung und Marktpotenzial. Impact & Nachhaltigkeit 10% Ökologischer und gesellschaftlicher Mehrwert der Lösung. Pitch & Demo 10% Klarheit der Präsentation und überzeugender Live-Demo. Preise Was du gewinnen kannst 🥇 1. title: StartupLive'26 ViennaUP
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstrasse 11, 1030, Vienna
descriptionFull:
Two Days. Limitless Potential. One Transformational Experience.

Join StartupLive’26 ViennaUP and immerse yourself in two days of innovation, collaboration, and competition within Vienna’s dynamic startup ecosystem.

Whether you’re a founder with a bold idea or a professional in tech, design, marketing, or business, this is your opportunity to build something meaningful alongside ambitious creators and experienced mentors.

Day 1 focuses on connection and creation. Founders deliver fast-paced 90-second pitches, followed by focused workshops and mentoring to refine business models, sharpen strategy, and strengthen startups.

Day 2 focuses on refinement and performance, with pitch training and financing workshops, followed by live competition in front of investors and corporate leaders.

Professionals (attendees) are invited to contribute their skills and co-create with early-stage founders. Startups gain direct access to mentors, investors, and Vienna’s startup ecosystem.

Visitors are welcome to join the final pitch event and experience the future of entrepreneurship live.

title: Europe Tech Hackathon
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Foyer 1 Ecke, Lassallestraße, Joseph-Roth-Gasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
The Europe Tech Hackathon is an intensive, hands-on innovation experience for people who want to turn ideas into real impact. In Vienna, interdisciplinary teams work on concrete sustainability challenges using technology, AI and data.

Throughout the hackathon, participants benefit from experienced mentors from tech, business and sustainability who actively support teams in sharpening ideas, validating assumptions and building functional prototypes. The results are presented to a professional jury of industry and innovation experts, who provide honest, constructive feedback focused on impact, feasibility and scalability.

More than a competition, the Europe Tech Hackathon is a unique experience: intense collaboration, rapid learning, strong community spirit and the energy of creating something meaningful together. Join if you want to build, learn and connect.

title: Impact Days
location: Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time.

’Holding Tensions, Creating Impact’ is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26.
As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care.

Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty.

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Impact Days '26 Impact Days 0 Skip to Content HOME ABOUT EDITION 2026 AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT EDITION 2026 AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT Folder: EDITION 2026 Back AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Stability & Change Stability & Change Stability & Change Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Tensions Shaping the Impact Economy Nature and Technology Rather than treating nature, humans, and technology as separate domains, Impact Days ‘26 brings them into a single system. Nature sets the boundaries within which economies must operate. Humans bring values, judgment, care, and responsibility. Artificialsystems extend our capacity to sense, analyse, and act at scale. This tension is about integration rather than opposition. It asks how technologies, including artificial intelligence, can be designed to strengthen human agency and regenerate natural systems, rather than override, replace, or extract from them. Core question: How do we design technologies and systems that operate in service of human dignity and planetary health? Stability and Change Most economic and institutional systems are built on assumptions of stability, predictability, and control. The reality we face is one of accelerating change, complex feedback loops, and unintended consequences. Impact Days ‘26 explores how entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders can operate responsibly without the illusion of certainty. This includes rethinking metrics, governance models, and decision-making processes suited to complex adaptive systems; where not all outcomes can be forecast in advance. Core question: How do we lead, invest, and innovate when the most important outcomes cannot be fully predicted? Value Extraction and Regeneration Economic systems constantly move along a spectrum between value extraction and value regeneration. Extraction enables speed, efficiency, and concentration of returns, while regeneration sustains the social and ecological foundations on which long-term value creation depends. Anchored in the Donut Economy, this tension reframes success as operating within planetary boundaries while strengthening social foundations. Capital, enterprises, and innovation are examined not as ends in themselves, but as tools for long-term system health and resilience. Core question:What would it mean to design businesses and investments that leave systems better than they found them? 2026 Lead Partners ENGAGE PARTNERs Content PARTNERs Impact Days is an media partners experience partners Impact Hub Vienna is Impact Days is designed & organised by Impact Hub Vienna © Copyright 2026 - Impact Days - All Rights Reserved. | Policy Center | Imprint Impact Hub Vienna At Impact Hub Vienna, where courage meets collaboration, transformation begins.​ We’re a community, united by common entrepreneurial dreams for the better. Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

title: Fundraising Secrets - The Complete Masterplan for Winning Investors and Building Lasting Relationships
location: Near Vienna Central Station (Hauptbahnhof) / Südtiroler Platz (exact address will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
Stop chasing buzzwords and start building real investor connections. I’ve been in your shoes—navigating the high-stakes world of VCs and Angels to secure 3 funding rounds across Austria, Germany, and the USA. Fundraising Secrets isn’t a theoretical lecture; it’s a deep dive into the reality of startup investment, based on my personal, battle-tested roadmap.

I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, we’re going “Beyond the Hype” to strip away the glossy myths. I’ll show you how to determine if an investor is actually the right match and how to engage in eye-level conversations built on credibility, not jargon. Whether you are a local founder or joining us from abroad, you’ll gain a universal blueprint to navigate your journey with confidence.

Don’t just hope for a check — learn how to foster lasting partnerships. You’ll leave with actionable techniques you can apply immediately at ViennaUP to turn your vision into a funded reality. Let’s get to work.

VAT. Your 1:1 consultation will take place online after the workshop, scheduled on a day of your choosing. 199,00 EUR Regular Ticket Ticket for consultants, corporates, non-founders, investors 150,00 EUR Description Note: This event has a total of only 40 seats available. Stop chasing buzzwords and start building real investor connections. I’ve been in your shoes—navigating the high-stakes world of VCs and Angels to secure 3 funding rounds across Austria, Germany, and the USA. Fundraising Secrets isn’t a theoretical lecture; it’s a deep dive into the reality of startup investment, based on my personal, battle-tested roadmap. We’re going “Beyond the Hype” to strip away the glossy myths. I’ll show you how to determine if an investor is actually the right match and how to engage in eye-level conversations built on credibility, not jargon. Whether you are a local founder or joining us from abroad, you’ll gain a universal blueprint to navigate your journey with confidence. Don’t just hope for a check — learn how to foster lasting partnerships. You’ll leave with actionable techniques you can apply immediately at ViennaUP to turn your vision into a funded reality. Let’s get to work. Keep in mind: Last year, this workshop was sold out. So reserve your ticket early. Agenda The workshop is split into two parts : Input: I'll share with you the Fundraising Secrets that helped me and 100+ of my mentees to raise money (details, see below) Live Q&A: I'll answer questions of you and other participants about your specific fundraising scenario In this hands-on workshop, you will learn: The #1 reason why founders fail to get investors Hands-on practical strategies that you can implement right away Strategic input that will help you design your entire fundraising campaign How investors tick, what they expect from you, and how you can use this to your benefit The hidden psychology that drives >50% of the decision to invest, and how you can control it Understanding who's the right investor for you The right timing for opening and closing your funding round Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 10:00 - 13:00 Near Wien Hauptbahnhof / Südtiroler Platz (exact address will be shared after booking) Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Der perfekte Pitch - vom Pitch Doktor, Dr. Florian Kandler - Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst. Der Perfekte Pitch - mit "Pitch Doktor" Dr. Florian Kandler Der Perfekte Pitch Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Newsletter » Fundraising Sommer Camp 2026 (startet am 1 Juli) ist jetzt zur Anmeldung geöffnet! DER PERFEKTE PITCH Überzeuge Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner von deinen Ideen und Produkten „Ich zeige dir, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Projekt, Produkt, Business oder Startup entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.“ — Dr. Florian Kandler (auch der „Pitch Doktor“ genannt) Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Pitch Tipps erhalten » Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Zugang zu meinem Newsletter sichern » Beratungs-Fokus Meine Beratung ist sehr stark fokussiert. Ich teile spezifisches Wissen, mit dem meine Klienten erfolgreich Kunden, Geschäftspartner und Investoren begeistern. Ich teile mein Wissen aus 20 Jahren Vertrieb und 15 Jahren als Unternehmer. Wissen aus meinen eigenen 3 Startups, die in Summe über 3 Millionen Euro von Investoren aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich gewinnen konnten. Und Wissen aus meinen hunderten Coachings als offizieller Pitch-Coach von der Startup TV-Show „2 Minuten 2 Millionen“ und als Fundraising-Workshopleiter bei diversen Startup-Akzeleratoren und Corporat Innovation Porgrammen. Fundraising Bei der Investorensuche helfe ich Gründer:innen dabei, mit dem optimalen Aufwand an die besten Investoren heranzukommen. Gemeinsam optimieren wir die Chancen um Termine, Folgetermine und Investitionszusagen zu erhalten. Dazu gehört neben dem perfekten Pitch auch das Wissen um den 4-stufigen Fundraising-Prozess: von der Vorbereitung, Beziehungsaufbau, zum Outreach und Closing. Außerdem konkrete Strategien dazu, wie man Empfehlungen nutzt, wie man mit Investoren auf Augenhöhe ins Gespärch kommt und strategisch agiert, um Investoren aus der Wartehaltung zu holen und zu einer Investitionsenscheidung zu bewegen. Jetzt Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Mein "Business Angels Devils" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich die versteckte Psychologie und Gedankenwelt von Business Angels. Du erfährst, was Business Angels wirklich wollen und wie du mit ihnen auf Augenhöhe verhandeln kannst. Dieses Buch habe ich auf Deutsch ganz persönlich, mit 0% KI und mit einigen lebhaften Anekdoten geschrieben und enthält viele meiner persönlichen Erlebnisse und Erfolgs-Strategien, die ich zur Investorensuche für meine eigenen Startups angewendet habe. Zum Business Devils Buch » Pitching Im Pitching helfe ich Menschen, ihre Idee, ihr Unternehmen oder ihr Angebot in kürzester Zeit so zu präsentieren, dass sie bei den Zuhörenden Neugier und echtes Interesse wecken. Das ist das Eintrittsticket in jede geschäftliche Beziehung oder Investition. Ein überzeugender Pitch entsteht, wenn Unterlagen und Präsentation perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sind. Zudem sollte jeder Pitch an das jeweilige Format angepasst werden – ob auf der Bühne, online, im persönlichen Gespräch oder vor einer Gruppe. Selbst wenn der Pitch zunächst per E-Mail verschickt wird, etwa mit dem Ziel, überhaupt ein Gespräch zu vereinbaren, muss er präzise und ansprechend formuliert sein. Jetzt Pitch Tipps erhalten » Mein "Pitch Tips" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich 33 meiner beliebtesten Tipps zur Optimierung deines Pitches. In jedem der dreiunddreißig Kapitel zeige ich dir die Methodik, die Psychologie und die konkrete Anwendung eines „Werkzeugs“, das du direkt auf deinen eigenen Pitch anwenden kannst, um ihn gezielt zu verbessern. Das Buch ist von mir auf Englisch und mit 0% KI verfasst und enthält zahlreiche Kniffe, die ich selbst regelmäßig nutze – sowohl für meine eigenen Pitches als auch in der Arbeit mit meinen Klientinnen und Klienten. Zum Pitch Tips Buch » Über mich Ich bin Florian, ich habe zwischen 2007 und 2015 drei Startups gegründet in denen ich immer für Fundraising, Marketing und Vertrieb zustädig war. Zwei meiner Startups erhielten in Summe über 3.000.000 Euro von VCs und Business Angels aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich . Ich war 6 Monate lang im Silicon Valley auf Investorensuche, habe dutzende Investoren in London, Berlin, München und Wien getroffen. Und unter anderem auch den deutschen eCommerce-Milliardär Oliver Samwer (Gründer: Rocket Internet, Zalando, etc.) als Investor gewinnen können. Seit 2016 unterstütze ich Gründer:innen bei der Investorensuche. Ich unterrichte außerdem an zahlreichen Startup Inkubatoren und Akzeleratoren . Bei diversen Konferenzen halte ich Vorträge, Workshops oder bereite Gründer:innen auf ihren Pitchauftritt vor. Und habe Erfahrung aus sechs Jahren als der offizielle Startup Coach der „österreichischen Höhle der Löwen“, der TV-Startup Show „ 2 Minuten 2 Millionen “ auf österreichs größtem Privat-TV Sender Puls4. Eine eigene Hauptabendsendung mit mir wurde ebenfalls auf Puls4 ausgstrahlt. Mein Wissen habe ich auch in 2 Bücher zum Thema Fundraising und Pitching gepackt. In über 200 Podcast-Episoden habe ich Gründer, Investoren und Innovatoren interviewt. Und jährlich veröffentliche ich seit 2015 Jahren den Startup Report , ein Bericht von und mit Gründer:innen, die im letzten Jahr Investoren gewinnen konnten. Es macht mir einfach riesigen Spaß, Unternehmer:innen mit meinem Wissen und meinen Kontakten auf ihrem Weg zum Erfolg zu unterstützen. Ich freue mich, wenn auch wir uns bald persönlich kennenlernen. WO Man Mich Findet Auf der Bühne Bei Konferenzen wie 4Gamechangers, WU Entrepreneuship Avenue, Business Angel Summit, Podim In Workshops In meinen eigenen Workshops und Vorträgen oder bei Startup Akzeleratoren Im Coaching In kleinen Gruppen, mit Founder Teams und auf exklusiven Founder Retreats Im TV und Stream Bei 2 Minuten 2 Millionen, bei Puls 4 im Frühstücks TV, im Live Stream Referenzen von Unternehmer*Innen Das sagen Coaching-Klienten über unsere Zusammenarbeit 5 mal Danke zu: 1. DANKE für deine absolute Klarheit . Du schaffst es, das Chaos im Kopf zu ordnen. 2. DANKE für deine Geheimtipps, wie man einen Pitch emotional abrundet. 3. DANKE, dass du dir egal wann und egal wo IMMER Zeit genommen hast und du einem gleichzeitig das Gefühl gibst nie zu stören mit egal welcher Frage. 4. DANKE für die mega Formulierungen und grenzgeniale Wortspiele - seitdem habe ich keine Angst mehr und weiß, wie man professionell auf kritische Fragen antwortet! 5. DANKE, dass du sogar im Nachgang noch Support lieferst. Ein Pitch Doktor mit sehr viel Weitblick, Verstand und mit dem Herz am rechten Fleck! Gloria Hiltmair Gründerin, Seitenbunt Die Tipps von Florian haben mir wahnsinnig geholfen und haben meinem Pitch den letzten Feinschliff gegeben. Es ist immer großartig von einem Firmenfremden ein Feedback zu bekommen, da die Firmenblindheit doch immer stärker wird und man so auf Sachen aufmerksam wird, die man nie gesehen hätte. Sehr kompetent, sehr freundlich und super schnell im Feedback. Ich kann Florian jedem nur empfehlen! Andreas Höllmüller Geschäftsführer, Tastery Philipp Lederle Gründer, helpsole Florians Feedback auf unseren Helpsole Pitch war unglaublich wertvoll. Wir konnten uns um einiges verbessern! Vielen Dank für deine Zeit und deinen Support! Aydin Umutlu Gründer, Ali Cola Was soll man da sagen...einfach nur toll. Sachlich auf den Punkt. Motivierend Fehler angesprochen. Nachvollziehbare Verbesserungsvorschläge. Und das in Rekordzeit. Danke, Florian. Martin Granig Gründer, Monkee Vielen Dank für deinen super Input. Nicht nur zum Pitch, sondern auch zu anderen taktischeren und strategischeren Fragestellungen. Super wertvoller und on-the-point Input. Ja

title: Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future
location: TU Wien (Technology University Vienna) near Karlsplatz (exact address will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
From Lab to Market: Scaling Europe’s Energy Future

Join the Energy Launchpad for an engaging discussion about transforming energy research into scalable European startups. Panelists from leading universities and corporations in the DACH region will explore how Europe can accelerate innovation, support startups, and develop a robust European energy ecosystem. Find out what makes the Energy Launchpad unique, learn about the challenges of bringing research to market, and discover how Europe can become a global leader in energy innovation. This event offers valuable insights for startups, investors, corporations, talent, and ecosystem players.

Tickets Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future Join leading experts at the Energy Launchpad to explore how energy innovation moves from lab to market FREE TICKET Description From Lab to Market: Scaling Europe’s Energy Future Join the Energy Launchpad at ViennaUP! How can Europe transform energy research into scalable startups and spin-offs that strengthen the resilience of critical infrastructure? Climate change and cyber threats put growing pressure on critical infrastructure such as energy systems, and secure, market-ready solutions are required. The Energy Launchpad brings together startups, researchers, corporates, and investors to close critical commercialization gaps in the energy sector. Explore Europe’s biggest opportunities in the energy market - from securing hydropower infrastructure in Alpine regions to bridging the gap between university spin-offs and ventures. Find out how start-ups drive resilience of energy systems through AI, quantum computing, and innovative business models, and discover the impact of research on solving real-world problems. Our experts from leading DACH universities and corporations will share their insights on innovation and how to accelerate it. They will also discuss how to overcome regulatory and financing barriers, and how to build a robust European energy ecosystem. On top, you will gain valuable insights into the requirements for building resilient energy businesses. Join us to connect with key ecosystem players and help shape Europe’s energy future. Tickets Ticket Mobility in Action FREE TICKET Description Mobility in Action brings together the people shaping the future of mobility infrastructure – from startups, public transport operators, infrastructure providers and city planners to industry partners, researchers, investors, policymakers and civil society. For the fourth time in a row at ViennaUP, Community creates Mobility hosts this open-innovation pitching format, creating a hands-on space where new solutions meet practical expertise. Startups will present their ideas and receive direct, constructive feedback from those who can support real-world implementation – from operators and planners to users, experts and decision-makers. This year, we will focus on the infrastructure layer of mobility innovation: stations, mobility hubs, interchanges, public spaces, wayfinding, safety, accessibility and charging infrastructure. Together, we will discuss how new solutions can improve the way people move through and experience mobility infrastructure. The event takes place at the ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, the innovation space of the Austrian Federal Railways – Austria’s largest mobility provider. 📆 Monday, 18th May 1.30 - 4pm 📍 ÖBB Open Innovation Factory , Lassallestrasse 5, Foyer 1 This year’s pitching startups include: - EZYMOB - KARUSO - City Layers - NewSense Engineering - Your Accessible Flight - easily | ChargeandMore Technologies - PowerShelter Join us to discover promising mobility innovations, share your perspective and connect with the people working on the next generation of mobility infrastructure. About us Our Team Blog Activities Mobility Manifesto Open Innovation Factory Community Book Learning Journeys Community in Action Mobility Innovation Camp Participate Events Contact Us Join DE Select Page #MoveTogether Shaping mobility for everyone – together. Community creates Mobility is the ecosystem for fair mobility. Our vision is to shape mobility as a common good and to achieve a holistic understanding of a desirable and sustainable future of mobility. Learn more Mission Because mobility affects all of us. Mobility is a key contributor to our quality of life. Because it affects us all, we see mobility as a common good. The joint design of intelligent mobility solutions is essential for the mobility transition. For this to succeed, we need a strong common understanding, a push towards more collaboration and a shared vision for the future of mobility.  The basis mobility as a societal mission and responsibility.  The approach Democratizing innovation processes.  The necessity We can only create the mobility of tomorrow together. community Innovative mobility has many facets In spring 2019, mobility designers launched this joint movement “Community creates Mobility” to create fresh impulses for new mobility concepts. Our network brings together diverse perspectives and expertise from established companies and start-ups, scientific and public institutions, as well as the civil society and is enjoying steady growth. title: Startup World Cup Austria 2026
companyName: invest.austria - Austrian association for private capital
descriptionFull:
The Startup World Cup, hosted by Pegasus Tech Ventures, is the largest startup competition worldwide, with more than 70 countries taking part every year. In 2021, the Austrian Angel Investors Association (now: invest.austria) and Austrian Startups brought the competition to Austria for the first time.

After a series of regional pre events across Austria, the winning startups compete on the final stage in Vienna, pitching for the chance to represent Austria at the global Startup World Cup Finals in Silicon Valley.

The finale programme features a fireside chat with international ecosystem leaders, followed by the final pitch competition, where selected startups present their vision in front of a high level jury of industry experts and investors. Each pitch is evaluated based on idea, market relevance, traction, competitive advantage, team and overall pitch performance.

The winning startup of the Austrian finals earns the opportunity to pitch at the Startup World Cup Grand Finale in San Francisco, with the chance to secure up to USD 1 million in investment from Pegasus Tech Ventures, along with global exposure, investor access and partner prizes.

title: The Perfect Pitch: How to Create Interest in You and Your Big Idea
location: Near Vienna Central Station (Hauptbahnhof) / Südtiroler Platz (exact location will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
Forget the flashy slides and over-rehearsed buzzwords. After years of pitching from Silicon Valley to Vienna to win over investors and partners, I’ve learned one thing: a "perfect pitch" isn’t a performance—it’s about creating genuine interest in a heartbeat.

I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, I’m giving you the battle-tested blueprint I’ve used to secure funding and build businesses. We’re going “Beyond the Hype” to focus on what actually works: clarity, authenticity, and substance. Whether you’re a founder, a creative, or a tech pioneer, you’ll learn how to articulate your value without the fluff.

Following a high-impact session at ViennaUP 2025, I’m back to help you master the art of the conversation starter. You’ll leave with a practical template to turn your big idea into a magnet for opportunities. Don’t just attend ViennaUP 2026 — be the person everyone wants to talk to. Let’s build a pitch that sticks.

Forget the flashy slides and over-rehearsed buzzwords. After years of pitching from Silicon Valley to Vienna to win over investors and partners, I’ve learned one thing: a "perfect pitch" isn’t a performance—it’s about creating genuine interest in a heartbeat. I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, I’m giving you the battle-tested blueprint I’ve used to secure funding and build businesses. Let’s build a pitch that sticks. Keep in mind: Last year, this workshop was sold out. So reserve your ticket early. Agenda The workshop is split into two parts : Input : I'll share some of the most powerful pitch strategies and practical methods you can use immediately (details, see below) Live Pitches & Feedback : I'll give a few participants the chance to present a 3-minute pitch, and the analyze and optimize this pitch live on stage for everyone to learn from In this hands-on workshop, you will learn: The most common problems and mistakes in pitches, and how to fix them The strategic masterplan to craft a convincing pitch Smart goal-setting of your pitch The 3 key triggers you must achieve with your pitch The audience's mental journey you need to guide them on What to focus on in a short pitch Use of AI to craft a pitch 4 powerful "Pitch Boosters" to boost your pitch's impact Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 14:00 - 17:00 Near Hauptbahnhof / Südtiroler Platz (exact location will be shared after booking) Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Der perfekte Pitch - vom Pitch Doktor, Dr. Florian Kandler - Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst. Der Perfekte Pitch - mit "Pitch Doktor" Dr. Florian Kandler Der Perfekte Pitch Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Newsletter » Fundraising Sommer Camp 2026 (startet am 1 Juli) ist jetzt zur Anmeldung geöffnet! DER PERFEKTE PITCH Überzeuge Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner von deinen Ideen und Produkten „Ich zeige dir, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Projekt, Produkt, Business oder Startup entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.“ — Dr. Florian Kandler (auch der „Pitch Doktor“ genannt) Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Pitch Tipps erhalten » Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Zugang zu meinem Newsletter sichern » Beratungs-Fokus Meine Beratung ist sehr stark fokussiert. Ich teile spezifisches Wissen, mit dem meine Klienten erfolgreich Kunden, Geschäftspartner und Investoren begeistern. Ich teile mein Wissen aus 20 Jahren Vertrieb und 15 Jahren als Unternehmer. Wissen aus meinen eigenen 3 Startups, die in Summe über 3 Millionen Euro von Investoren aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich gewinnen konnten. Und Wissen aus meinen hunderten Coachings als offizieller Pitch-Coach von der Startup TV-Show „2 Minuten 2 Millionen“ und als Fundraising-Workshopleiter bei diversen Startup-Akzeleratoren und Corporat Innovation Porgrammen. Fundraising Bei der Investorensuche helfe ich Gründer:innen dabei, mit dem optimalen Aufwand an die besten Investoren heranzukommen. Gemeinsam optimieren wir die Chancen um Termine, Folgetermine und Investitionszusagen zu erhalten. Dazu gehört neben dem perfekten Pitch auch das Wissen um den 4-stufigen Fundraising-Prozess: von der Vorbereitung, Beziehungsaufbau, zum Outreach und Closing. Außerdem konkrete Strategien dazu, wie man Empfehlungen nutzt, wie man mit Investoren auf Augenhöhe ins Gespärch kommt und strategisch agiert, um Investoren aus der Wartehaltung zu holen und zu einer Investitionsenscheidung zu bewegen. Jetzt Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Mein "Business Angels Devils" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich die versteckte Psychologie und Gedankenwelt von Business Angels. Du erfährst, was Business Angels wirklich wollen und wie du mit ihnen auf Augenhöhe verhandeln kannst. Dieses Buch habe ich auf Deutsch ganz persönlich, mit 0% KI und mit einigen lebhaften Anekdoten geschrieben und enthält viele meiner persönlichen Erlebnisse und Erfolgs-Strategien, die ich zur Investorensuche für meine eigenen Startups angewendet habe. Zum Business Devils Buch » Pitching Im Pitching helfe ich Menschen, ihre Idee, ihr Unternehmen oder ihr Angebot in kürzester Zeit so zu präsentieren, dass sie bei den Zuhörenden Neugier und echtes Interesse wecken. Das ist das Eintrittsticket in jede geschäftliche Beziehung oder Investition. Ein überzeugender Pitch entsteht, wenn Unterlagen und Präsentation perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sind. Zudem sollte jeder Pitch an das jeweilige Format angepasst werden – ob auf der Bühne, online, im persönlichen Gespräch oder vor einer Gruppe. Selbst wenn der Pitch zunächst per E-Mail verschickt wird, etwa mit dem Ziel, überhaupt ein Gespräch zu vereinbaren, muss er präzise und ansprechend formuliert sein. Jetzt Pitch Tipps erhalten » Mein "Pitch Tips" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich 33 meiner beliebtesten Tipps zur Optimierung deines Pitches. In jedem der dreiunddreißig Kapitel zeige ich dir die Methodik, die Psychologie und die konkrete Anwendung eines „Werkzeugs“, das du direkt auf deinen eigenen Pitch anwenden kannst, um ihn gezielt zu verbessern. Das Buch ist von mir auf Englisch und mit 0% KI verfasst und enthält zahlreiche Kniffe, die ich selbst regelmäßig nutze – sowohl für meine eigenen Pitches als auch in der Arbeit mit meinen Klientinnen und Klienten. Zum Pitch Tips Buch » Über mich Ich bin Florian, ich habe zwischen 2007 und 2015 drei Startups gegründet in denen ich immer für Fundraising, Marketing und Vertrieb zustädig war. Zwei meiner Startups erhielten in Summe über 3.000.000 Euro von VCs und Business Angels aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich . Ich war 6 Monate lang im Silicon Valley auf Investorensuche, habe dutzende Investoren in London, Berlin, München und Wien getroffen. Und unter anderem auch den deutschen eCommerce-Milliardär Oliver Samwer (Gründer: Rocket Internet, Zalando, etc.) als Investor gewinnen können. Seit 2016 unterstütze ich Gründer:innen bei der Investorensuche. Ich unterrichte außerdem an zahlreichen Startup Inkubatoren und Akzeleratoren . Bei diversen Konferenzen halte ich Vorträge, Workshops oder bereite Gründer:innen auf ihren Pitchauftritt vor. Und habe Erfahrung aus sechs Jahren als der offizielle Startup Coach der „österreichischen Höhle der Löwen“, der TV-Startup Show „ 2 Minuten 2 Millionen “ auf österreichs größtem Privat-TV Sender Puls4. Eine eigene Hauptabendsendung mit mir wurde ebenfalls auf Puls4 ausgstrahlt. Mein Wissen habe ich auch in 2 Bücher zum Thema Fundraising und Pitching gepackt. In über 200 Podcast-Episoden habe ich Gründer, Investoren und Innovatoren interviewt. Und jährlich veröffentliche ich seit 2015 Jahren den Startup Report , ein Bericht von und mit Gründer:innen, die im letzten Jahr Investoren gewinnen konnten. Es macht mir einfach riesigen Spaß, Unternehmer:innen mit meinem Wissen und meinen Kontakten auf ihrem Weg zum Erfolg zu unterstützen. Ich freue mich, wenn auch wir uns bald persönlich kennenlernen. WO Man Mich Findet Auf der Bühne Bei Konferenzen wie 4Gamechangers, WU Entrepreneuship Avenue, Business Angel Summit, Podim In Workshops In meinen eigenen Workshops und Vorträgen oder bei Startup Akzeleratoren Im Coaching In kleinen Gruppen, mit Founder Teams und auf exklusiven Founder Retreats Im TV und Stream Bei 2 Minuten 2 Millionen, bei Puls 4 im Frühstücks TV, im Live Stream Referenzen von Unternehmer*Innen Das sagen Coaching-Klienten über unsere Zusammenarbeit 5 mal Danke zu: 1. DANKE für deine absolute Klarheit . Du schaffst es, das Chaos im Kopf zu ordnen. 2. DANKE für deine Geheimtipps, wie man einen Pitch emotional abrundet. 3. DANKE, dass du dir egal wann und egal wo IMMER Zeit genommen hast und du einem gleichzeitig das Gefühl gibst nie zu stören mit egal welcher Frage. 4. DANKE für die mega Formulierungen und grenzgeniale Wortspiele - seitdem habe ich keine Angst mehr und weiß, wie man professionell auf kritische Fragen antwortet! 5. DANKE, dass du sogar im Nachgang noch Support lieferst. Ein Pitch Doktor mit sehr viel Weitblick, Verstand und mit dem Herz am rechten Fleck! Gloria Hiltmair Gründerin, Seitenbunt Die Tipps von Florian haben mir wahnsinnig geholfen und haben meinem Pitch den letzten Feinschliff gegeben. Es ist immer großartig von einem Firmenfremden ein Feedback zu bekommen, da die Firmenblindheit doch immer stärker wird und man so auf Sachen aufmerksam wird, die man nie gesehen hätte. Sehr kompetent, sehr freundlich und super schnell im Feedback. Ich kann Florian jedem nur empfehlen! Andreas Höllmüller Geschäftsführer, Tastery Philipp Lederle Gründer, helpsole Florians Feedback auf unseren Helpsole Pitch war unglaublich wertvoll. Wir konnten uns um einiges verbessern! Vielen Dank für deine Zeit und deinen Support! Aydin Umutlu Gründer, Ali Cola Was soll man da sagen...einfach nur toll. Sachlich auf den Punkt. Motivierend Fehler angesprochen. Nachvollziehbare Verbesserungsvorschläge. Und das in Rekordzeit. Danke, Florian. Martin Granig Gründer, Monkee Vielen Dank für deinen super Input. Nicht nur zum Pitch, sondern auch zu anderen taktischeren und strategischeren Fragestellungen. Super wertvoller und on-the-point Input. Ja

title: ViennaUP 2026 Opening Night
location: The Vienna City Hall, Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
ViennaUP 2026 returns in style: get ready to kick off a week of bold ideas in one of the city's most magical locations.

For this year's Opening Night, the Vienna Business Agency brings together founders, investors, and ecosystem representatives from around the world in none other than the Vienna City Hall, a place that best captures what the festival is all about: big ambition rooted in a history of innovation.

Beneath the light of the chandeliers, in a place that has shaped European culture, we will start forward-thinking conversations that will carry throughout the entire week as we make connections, build networks, and grow our businesses. The event is hosted by the Vienna Business Agency, which initiates and curates ViennaUP, our decentralised, community-driven festival brought to life year after year in partnership with local and international ecosystem players. 

The evening combines inspiration, substance, and a touch of surprise, including a special keynote by Fredrik Debong, serial entrepreneur and founder of mySugr, a Viennese buffet, and much more.

Expect exciting encounters and fresh perspectives, all against a breathtaking backdrop. See you in Vienna!

Beneath the light of the chandeliers, in a space that has shaped European culture, we will start forward-thinking conversations that will carry throughout the entire week as we make meaningful connections, build networks, and grow our businesses. title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. The application will be open until the 4th of May 11:00 am. We will get back to you after the application deadline. title: Connect Day 26
descriptionFull:
Connect Day 26 is the #1 platform for fostering connections among startups, corporates, SMEs, and investors. The event is designed to spark partnerships, promote innovation, and provide opportunities for pitching your ideas.

What to expect:

  • B2B Matchmaking 1:1: 15-minute targeted "speed dating" with startups, corporates, and investors to explore potential collaborations and validate your ideas. Taking place throughout the entire day.
  • 4 Topics each incl. startup pitches & expert panel:
    Dive into the topics through interactive panels, expert Q&A, and six startup pitches per session.
    • FrontierTech & AI
    • GreenTech & Manufacturing
    • MedTech & LifeScience
    • UrbanTech, Mobility & EnergyTransition
  • Expo Area: Startups and corporates present themselves to an innovation-driven audience.
  • Corporate Reverse Pitches: Corporates and SMEs pitch their collaboration opportunities directly to startups.

Join the dynamic innovation ecosystem of Austria and Europe in a focused, engaging, and impactful day of networking and knowledge-sharing. Apply now to secure your spot!

Access to Connect Day is only possible after being accepted/activated on www.connectday.at.

Day 2 of Impact Days is all about giving space to deepen conversation. With our different Deep Dive Session, spread all around Vienna, you have the chance to explore topics with experts and peers in a newly engaging and profound way. 

0 12:00:00 35529 5,9 false 274 09:00:00 1,2,3,4,5,6 1779862947 275 ViennaUP | Impact Days Programme Log in Impact Days To book a ticket please kindly register or log in here . Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time. Holding Tensions, Creating Impact is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26. As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care. Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty. Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 09:00 - 19.05.2026 12:00 Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010 Wien Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Impact Days '26 Impact Days 0 Skip to Content HOME ABOUT EDITION 2026 AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT EDITION 2026 AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT Folder: EDITION 2026 Back AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS VIDEO Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Stability & Change Stability & Change Stability & Change Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Tensions Shaping the Impact Economy Nature and Technology Rather than treating nature, humans, and technology as separate domains, Impact Days ‘26 brings them into a single system. Nature sets the boundaries within which economies must operate. Humans bring values, judgment, care, and responsibility. Artificialsystems extend our capacity to sense, analyse, and act at scale. This tension is about integration rather than opposition. It asks how technologies, including artificial intelligence, can be designed to strengthen human agency and regenerate natural systems, rather than override, replace, or extract from them. Core question: How do we design technologies and systems that operate in service of human dignity and planetary health? Stability and Change Most economic and institutional systems are built on assumptions of stability, predictability, and control. The reality we face is one of accelerating change, complex feedback loops, and unintended consequences. Impact Days ‘26 explores how entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders can operate responsibly without the illusion of certainty. This includes rethinking metrics, governance models, and decision-making processes suited to complex adaptive systems; where not all outcomes can be forecast in advance. Core question: How do we lead, invest, and innovate when the most important outcomes cannot be fully predicted? Value Extraction and Regeneration Economic systems constantly move along a spectrum between value extraction and value regeneration. Extraction enables speed, efficiency, and concentration of returns, while regeneration sustains the social and ecological foundations on which long-term value creation depends. Anchored in the Donut Economy, this tension reframes success as operating within planetary boundaries while strengthening social foundations. Capital, enterprises, and innovation are examined not as ends in themselves, but as tools for long-term system health and resilience. Core question:What would it mean to design businesses and investments that leave systems better than they found them? 2026 Lead Partners ENGAGE PARTNERs Content PARTNERs Impact Days is an media partners experience partners Impact Hub Vienna is Impact Days is designed & organised by Impact Hub Vienna © Copyright 2026 - Impact Days - All Rights Reserved. | Policy Center | Imprint Impact Hub Vienna At Impact Hub Vienna, where courage meets collaboration, transformation begins.​ We’re a community, united by common entrepreneurial dreams for the better. Impact Makers. We make it happen. We envision an economy where everyone thrives. title: The Female Founders Experience Vienna 2026
location: The Social Hub Vienna, Nordbahnstrasse 47, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Fostering change through real connections.

​The world may feel like it’s going crazy. Instead of complaining, we created FFX – a space for trusted, authentic, and lasting connections.

​We bring together Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders to learn from each other, exchange openly, and build relationships that last a lifetime.
And yes, this is a women-only event.

​This time, we bundle strengths as we know it's the only path forward for radical change: FFX joins forces with ViennaUP to bring the Austrian and European ecosystems together.

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Female Founders Building Europe's Innovation Economy. With everyone at the table. About Our Offers FF Experience FF Bootcamp Newsletter Newsletter Built by I.Kunev Newsletter Newsletter FEmale Founders Female Founders is Europe’s leading platform for women shaping the future of business, capital, tech and innovation. Explore our formats Explore our formats Partner with us Partner with us 250+ Startups backed 500+VCs in the Network 50% Deep Tech Partners we've worked with Female Founders isn't here to fit into the tech ecosystem, it's here to rewrite it. A decade ago, two founders saw the systems shaping entrepreneurship weren't built for women. So they built new ones. Today, we connect female founders, investors and corporates across Europe to build stronger companies, better products and a more competitive economy. Women are not a niche. They are one of the most powerful economic forces in the world. Together, we make waves. For Founders Build stronger. Scale faster. Never alone. Female Founders gives women building startups the leverage to win: direct access to capital, corporates, knowledge, operators, investors and a network that moves with them. We strengthen founders with what the market too often withholds, so they move faster, build with conviction, and shape markets that drive a more competitive Europe. From access to capital. From capital to scale. Join as Founder Join as Founder For Partners Reach the women shaping the market. Female Founders gives corporates direct access to the most powerful consumer decision-making group in the world - women, as founders, leaders, investors and the decision-makers shaping what gets bought next. Partners reach the audience defining what gets built, trusted and bought next and turn that proximity into market position, growth and measurable return. A strategic investment in relevance, growth and revenue. Become a Partner Become a Partner For Investors Access the overlooked upside in Europe’s innovation economy. Female Founders connects Business Angels, VCs, CVCs and Family Offices with high-potential startups built and led by women and diverse teams across Europe. We give investors access to opportunities others miss, and to the companies driving Europe's next wave of growth, alongside the co-investors needed to move early. The leverage: sharper market insight, dealflow & stronger networks. Join as Investor Join as Investor Three levers . One community . What we do beneath every founder we back, every investor we connect, every market we move. SUPPORTING THE FOUNDERS We invest in the person before the company. Capability, confidence, clarity. When founders get stronger, everything they build gets stronger with them. CONNECTING THE ECOSYSTEM We make the connections the market leaves to chance. Founders, investors, corporates - all in one place. 87k+ members, 500+ VCs, 175+ partner companies. Relationships that create real economic activity. ENABLING THE ECONOMY We change who builds and who benefits. Hardware, deep tech, infrastructure. Female founders are the untapped majority of Europe's innovation capacity. We are changing that at scale. Our Offers Our Offers Facts and figures The Numbers That Matter €680k Average raised per founder in the community. 87k Active members across Europe and beyond. €28M raised by Fund F to back female co-founded teams. 87k Active members across Europe and beyond. €28M raised by Fund F to back female co-founded teams. 175+ Partners who know different perspectives build better solutions. Our Offers What do you need to move forward? The Female Founders Experience 120 Founders, Investors & Leaders | Europe-Wide | Application-Based FFX is not your typical conference: A curated gathering of 120 female founders, investors and senior leaders, built around conversations on capital, AI, defense tech, leadership and what's actually shaping the market. We prioriatize outcome-focused connections and joy over FOMO. The Female Founders Bootcamp (FFB) Early-Stage Founders | 4-week hybrid accelerator | In-person Summit ‍ Built for early-stage women-led startups ready to go from early signal to investor-ready. Four weeks of hands-on work on strategy, positioning, investor readiness and network, taught by operators, investors and serial entrepreneurs who've built and backed companies themselves. Combining practical tools, expert feedback & honest support from people who know what it takes. The Female Money Days Curated | Accessible | Women-Only The conversations about money that women rarely get to have, and the knowledge most of us were never given. For leaders, founders, professionals, women managing their own wealth, women starting to invest, and women curious about what's possible. The format covers personal finance, investing with impact, backing women-led businesses, and building wealth across generations. The Female Founders Circle Year-long | Membership | Authentic A paid membership for women in business, founders, leaders, SMEs and investors. Curated partner perks, event discounts, a community space where you can actually be yourself, and access the tools and support you need to keep going. Start co-creating. ‍ If your brand, product, fund or talent pipeline depends on proximity to Europe's next generation of women founders, a logo on a banner won't get you there. Relationships will. title: Salon Future: Connecting Startup Ecosystems
descriptionFull:
Join a unique platform designed for city representatives, startup ecosystem builders, and organizations committed to fostering thriving startup communities. Salon Future is your opportunity to connect, collaborate, and exchange insights with peers from cities around the globe.

This event is dedicated to sharing experiences, tackling challenges, and exploring innovative solutions to enhance startup ecosystems. Attendees can participate in dynamic panel discussions, interactive sessions, and engaging networking opportunities.

Key topics include:

  • Building and nurturing entrepreneurial communities.
  • Attracting international startups to your city.
  • Discussing forward-thinking policies to support startup growth.

Please, be aware that Salon Future is NOT an event for startups!

Are you responsible for startup-related initiatives in your city? Would you like to join us at Salon Future? Register now for our waiting list, and we’ll be in touch!

title: Human x AI Conference
descriptionFull:
Human×AI is a medium for ideas, vision, partnership, and collaboration, bringing together the brightest minds at the intersection of artificial intelligence and European ambition.

Human×AI Europe is a platform for the conversation that matters most: how we build Europe's next era.

It's where founders, investors, businesses, policymakers, and cities come together to shape a future that's prosperous, sovereign, and human—by design.

Europe's next chapter won't write itself. Strategic autonomy in technology, security, and the ecosystems where innovation takes root depends on choices being made now. This conference gathers the people who must work together—to forge partnerships, launch pilots, and commit to what comes next.

Tickets No Tickets available! Description Human × AI: The Ecosystems of a Prosperous and Sovereign Europe Europe's next chapter won't be written by algorithms alone. It will be shaped by the founders who dare, the investors who believe, the cities that host, and the minds that refuse to inherit someone else's future. On May 19, 2026, Vienna becomes the stage for Europe's most essential conversation: how we build technological sovereignty without losing what makes us human. On this day, the roles will reverse - AI will pose the questions. People will provide the answers. Agenda A full day shaping Europe's AI future 11:00 doors 12:00 programme starts 18:10 close Conference Agenda https://humanxai.events/agenda Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 19.05.2026 12:00 - 18:30 mumok - Museum moderner Kunst Stiftung Ludwig Museumsplatz 1 1070 Vienna / Hofstallung Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Human × AI Conference | 2026 Recap — Vienna Human × AI Conference 2026 — a landmark day in Vienna. 200+ attendees, 29 speakers, one conversation about Europe Human AI Conference, ViennaUP 2026, European AI, tech conference Vienna, AI ecosystem Europe, conference recap, 2026 highlights 200+ attendees, 29 speakers, 30+ countries. Human × AI Conference 2026 happened — and the conversation continues. See what was said. Human × AI Conference 200+ attendees, 29 speakers, 30+ countries. Human × AI Conference 2026 happened — and the conversation continues. Part of 2026 · ✓ May 19, 2026 · Vienna · 200+ Attendees · 2027 — Stay Updated → Speakers Agenda Builders Partners Venue Content Hub Contact 2027 — Stay Updated ✓ Event Completed May 19, 2026 · Vienna, Austria Human × AI Conference Thank you, Vienna . A city that hosted us beautifully — and an audience that showed up curious, generous, and brilliant. 200+ people from 30+ countries, 29 speakers, one unforgettable day at Hofstallungen MUMOK asking the slower, harder questions about Europe's AI future. Voices from the Room ↓ View Agenda Eventhinkplay The Story Europe stands at a crossroads As AI reshapes industries and societies, Europe faces a defining moment. The continent that gave the world the Renaissance, the Industrial Revolution, and the foundations of modern science now confronts a new frontier—one that will determine its place in the global order for generations to come. The question is no longer whether AI will transform Europe, but how Europe will shape AI to reflect its values: human dignity, democratic governance, and sustainable prosperity. The Big Question Will Europe seize this generational momentum to build AI-powered ecosystems that are prosperous, sovereign, and human-centered? Our Mission Building an AI-powered, sovereign Europe Human×AI brings together leaders, builders, and thinkers at the intersection of artificial intelligence and European ambition. Through our annual conference and always-on content hub, we foster the collaborations that will define Europe's technological future — balancing innovation with human values, growth with sovereignty. Conference Pillars 01 Startups & Innovation European AI ventures reshaping industries 02 Enterprise Transformation How established companies integrate AI responsibly 03 Capital & Investment Funding the next wave of European AI 04 Policy & Sovereignty Governance frameworks for an AI-first continent Who We Bring Together Ecosystem Stakeholders Startups Ambitious founders building the next generation of AI-powered ventures, from early-stage to scale-ups ready for growth. Universities Research institutions, faculty, and talent pipelines driving fundamental AI innovation and developing tomorrow's workforce. Investors VCs, corporate investors, and institutional funds seeking the next European AI champions to back and scale. Businesses Enterprise leaders and SMEs transforming their operations with AI while navigating the changing competitive landscape. Cities Municipal leaders, policymakers, and urban innovators building smart, sustainable communities powered by technology. Featured Speakers Ivan Krastev Chairman, Centre for Liberal Strategies | Permanent Fellow, IWM Vienna Helfried Carl Founder & CEO, European Capital of Democracy Michael Leitner-Hickisch Team Lead Digitalisation & AI, UIV Urban Innovation Vienna Victor Tchervenobrejki Head of AI and ML Solutions, Cloud Office View all speakers → Always-on Content Hub Explore all articles → People May 15, 2026 · 4 min read The Quiet Disappearance of Agency in the Age of AI Agents Ideas May 15, 2026 · 7 min read Cloud Office: The Regional Cloud and AI Partner European Enterprises Are Choosing People Apr 23, 2026 · 5 min read The Security Bet: Valentin Tabus on Backing Europe's Cybersecurity Founders People Apr 10, 2026 · 6 min read The World Builder: Maya Pindeus on Synthetic Data and Another Earth Subscribe to the Daily Brief — 4 articles a day, zero noise. Human×AI Conference At a Glance 29 Speakers & Panelists 200 + Attendees 30 + Countries Represented 1 Unforgettable Day Voices from the Room What People Said AI is moving fast. Today, HumanxAI was asking the slower, harder question: what kind of future are we actually building? Europe's next chapter will not write itself. At ViennaUP, it is being discussed, challenged and designed — by the people who need to work together to make it real. ViennaBusiness Wirtschaftsagentur Wien · Official ViennaUP Partner AI can save a knowledge worker up to 2 hours per day. Then why don't we feel like we have 2 more hours? The real competitive advantage in the AI era is not who uses the best AI software — it is who can focus on the most meaningful work that actually brings the value. AI helps us do more. Clarity helps us do what matters. Vienna was truly special. Maria Stoeva, MBA Strategic Advisor · Closing Keynote Speaker The question is no longer whether Europe can copy Silicon Valley. It is whether European founders can use the foundation Europe already has. The next wave of category-defining European companies will not come from founders who run away from regulation. It will come from founders who understand how to build with it. Konstantin Bezuhanov, PhD CEO, Evrotrust · Panelist, "Can Europe Build Its Own Technology Foundation?" People from more than 30 European countries came together to talk about Europe, innovation, and how to handle change — not just technologically, but also socially and humanly. I left the day with a lot of confidence, because I met people who want to shape things positively together. WE ARE EUROPEANS. UNITED BY AGENCY, RESPONSIBILITY AND TRUST. Marina Adele Scherz MAPP&C | Positive Leadership · Attendee Yesterday's HumanxAI conference at ViennaUP definitely gave me some new things to consider. LLMs make it easy to "outsource your brain" — but that doesn't mean you should stop training this muscle. Think about when you outsource it and where to. And Ivan Krastev's closing line stayed with me: "Optimism can be as toxic as pessimism, but there is nothing wrong with being hopeful." Kristina Wrohlich Workshop Facilitator, Wirtschaftsagentur Wien · Attendee What does it mean to be good at your job when AI already has the answers? That was the question Dr. Thomas Leoni left hanging in the room. It's no longer about who can find the answer fastest. What's becoming rare is the ability to take an output and place it in the right context. That's not a technical skill. It's judgment. Experience. Pattern recognition. Amit Grinvald Leadership Communication Coach · Attendee More reactions on LinkedIn → Part of Europe's Largest Startup Festival Human×AI is an official event of ViennaUP 2026, bringing together the global innovation community in Vienna. 15K+ Participants 95 Countries 30+ Flagship Events 44M Impressions 600K Website Visitors 750K Interactions Expired €500 Travel Grant for International Startups ViennaUP 2026 supports global founders with travel grants covering accommodation, transport, and event fees. Applications closed March 15, 2026. Learn More → Human×AI on ViennaUP Programme → Venue Join us in Vienna Hofstallungen MUMOK · Part of ViennaUP 2026 The premier gathering of innovators, founders and investors in Central Europe. One day of concentrated AI insight, networking, and collaboration at the heart of Vienna's cultural quarter. Every piece reviewed by a human lead. Published to Your website LinkedIn X Newsletter Topic sites The difference Not pure tech. Not pure people. Both. Where most AI content tools are pure technology and most content agencies are pure people, Visibilio is both — at every cycle, on every piece. Most AI tools Pure technology Endless words, no judgement. Volume without a point of view. Visibilio A hybrid content operation. AI agents do the specialised work; a Visibilio Lead reviews every piece. Always one message away. Most agencies Pure people Writes well, stays shallow. Craft without the depth of research. The problem Stop paying rent on people who’ll never be yours. Every month, B2B companies wire fortunes to Meta, LinkedIn, Google — to be put briefly in front of an audience they’ll never own. Stop paying, and the audience disappears. Change campaign, the audience disappears. Run out of budget, the audience disappears. You don’t own them. You rent them. And the landlord raises the rent every quarter. Visibilio is the operation that builds an audience that comes back on its own — every day, in your voice, on the channels where your audience actually lives, not where the platforms tell you they live. Getting started From signing to your first published post. Minutes if you self-serve. Seven days with a Visibilio Lead. You choose how involved you want to be. The platform runs every day. The platform builds your business map. +25 min First piece drafted The platform generates your first article from the map it just built. Illustrated, formatted, ready to ship. your pace Review and approve You decide what ships. With a Visibilio Lead · Seven days Onboarded by your Lead, in person. 7 days Day 1 Kickoff call Your Visibilio Lead learns your business in depth, on a call with you. The research stack starts running the same day. Day 2 AI editor trained The platform is trained on your voice, audience, and topics — your Visibilio Lead reviews every parameter before it locks in. Day 3 Channels connected. Dossier delivered. Your website, content hub, and social channels go live in the platform. The first research dossier is shared with you. Day 4–5 First batch drafted The platform writes. Your Visibilio Lead reviews every piece before you see it. Day 6 You review with your Visibilio Lead You see everything. One revision round if needed. Your Visibilio Lead walks you through any decisions. Day 7 Published Goes live across your site, your inbox, and every social channel where your clients spend time. The platform learns your business, runs the research, drafts the pieces, sends them for your approval, and publishes them to your channels. A Visibilio Lead steps in for what the platform shouldn’t decide alone — strategy and editorial direction, sensitive or high-stakes pieces, client interviews and original reporting, quarterly reviews. Most clients combine both. Both paths deliver the same editorial standard. Different time. Different depth. Same review process. Why it works Good content needs two things. We solve both by writing from research. 01 Deep understanding of the business. The map of your voice, your offer, and what genuinely makes you different — built before a word is written. 02 Writing that’s actually worth reading. Editorial craft held to a publication standard, so every piece earns the attention it asks for. Most attempts get one and miss the other. Agencies write well but stay shallow on the business. AI tools produce endless words but say nothing real. In-house writers know the business but get pulled into a dozen other jobs and never publish consistently. Visibilio closes the gap — a research dossier built before the first word is written, refreshed every cycle, and every piece reviewed by a human lead before it reaches your audience. How it works How the research actually works. Specialised AI agents do specialised work. One agent reads your competitors, another profiles your clients, a third tunes your voice. Each agent does one job well, and every output is reviewed by a Visibilio Lead before it touches your content. 01 AI Intake your business 02 AI Research four parallel streams Company Market Clients Competitors 03 AI Editorial voice + brief — Human You review human checkpoint 04 AI Production drafting + review 05 AI Distribution your channels All five platform stages run inside the Visibilio platform What we track One system. Four ways of seeing your market. I The Business A team of AI agents interviews your people, reads everything you’ve already published, and listens to how your clients describe what you do. From this, they build a full map of your voice, your offer, and what makes you different. You see it. You correct it. Everything we write afterwards comes from this map — and the map keeps refining itself, cycle after cycle. II The Market Specialised agents scan what’s being discussed in your market right now — what’s saturated, what’s ignored, where the obvious takes are crowded, where original angles are still open. You see the map of the space before a single post goes live. So your content doesn’t just add to the noise. III The Clients Other agents build detailed profiles of the people you’re trying to reach — their roles, the pressures they’re under, the questions they actually type into Google, the language they use to describe their own problems. Every piece we publish is written for one specific profile. Never for everyone. IV The Competitors A separate group of agents reads your competitors continuously. Where they’re loud, where they’re quiet, what angles they’ve never touched. You get a clear view of the gaps you can fill. Then we fill them. All four streams run in parallel. Our editors review every output before it touches your content. The people Three disciplines. One operation. Editorial standard, engineering depth, marketing intelligence — built into one team and one platform. Every piece you publish carries all three. title: "Do it right" Basics for company founding in Vienna
location: Wirtschaftskammer Wien, Straße der Wiener Wirtschaft 1, 1020 Vienna, EG (ground floor), Saal 5
descriptionFull:
This workshop provides a practical guide for founders and startups, covering everything you need to know before, during, and after starting your business with a trade license. Topics include:

Before founding: choosing the right legal form, understanding types of trades (free vs. regulated), planning finances, and exploring funding opportunities (e.g., NeuFöG)

During founding: registering your trade license in Vienna, entering the commercial register, and setting up commercial social insurance

After founding: understanding taxes, managing ongoing compliance, and navigating social insurance (including part-time self-employment)

After the seminar, participants will have the opportunity to connect with experts in these areas to ask questions and get practical advice tailored to their business.

title: From Pitch to Patient: How Digital Health and AI actually make it into Practice
descriptionFull:
There are plenty of new HealthTech ideas – and some actually have the potential to change the healthcare system! At this meetup we will bring startups and professionals from hospitals, care facilities, and medical practices together and focus on real problems in healthcare, concrete solutions, and an honest look at what works in practice. Beyond individual improvements, we explore how technological innovation has the potential to fundamentally transform healthcare systems, making them more efficient, accessible, and patient-centered.

Through short keynotes, startup pitches, use cases and interactive discussions, we show how innovations can be designed to ease workflows, benefit patients, and integrate into existing structures.

Whether you're a founder, physician, nurse, manager, or IT professional – if you want to help ensure that innovation in healthcare doesn't get stuck in pitch decks but actually reaches patients and teams, driving systemic change in the process, you're in the right place.

title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for honest conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

We will get back to you via email with the result. FREE TICKET Description Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026 : invitation-style round tables where selected startups meet experienced investors and innovation managers for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward. After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. The application will be open until the 4th of May 11:00 am. We will get back to you after the application deadline. title: HOIV Founder Huddle 2026: Pitch, Build & Scale
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstraße 11, 1030 Vienna
descriptionFull:
HOIV Founder Huddle 2026 is a focused, consultation-driven session designed for a curated group of startup teams who are actively building and looking for meaningful strategic input. As part of ViennaUP, the session enables a space where founders can openly discuss real challenges and receive practical, experience-driven feedback.

This is not a traditional demo day or pitch competition. Instead, it is a structured working session that blends elements of a workshop, meet-the-expert format, and moderated group discussion.

Selected startups will join experienced operators, investors, VCs, banks, and industry experts in a structured working format.
- It is an open setting designed for real conversation.
- The focus is on real topics that founders face every day — from market positioning and product direction to fundraising preparation, operational bottlenecks, team dynamics, and scaling decisions.

title: Lab to Leader: Building Science Ventures That Last
location: TU in the Sky,  Getreidemarkt  9,  1060 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Future-Proof Cofounder Teams & Scaling-Ready Startups
Transform research into ventures built to scale. This full-day track tackles the make-or-break challenges every science startup faces: finding the right cofounder and scaling successfully. 

What to Expect

  • Cofounder Matching Pitches – A joint initiative by AIT, BOKU, MedUni Wien, TU Wien, Uni Wien, WU Wien & Xista, connecting local and international academic spinoffs with business cofounders through pitches and dedicated networking zones

  • Panel: "Cofounder and Scaling Stories – Wins, Woes & Needs," moderated by Petra Wolkenstein, Konsultori

  • Guided Networking & Spin-Off Booths

  • Keynote: "Aligning for Success – Building Future-Proof Cofounder Teams," with Michael Kubiena, Konsultori

  • Session: "How to Build a Dream Team: Why Interdisciplinarity is Key", New Venture Scouting

  • Closing: Markus Wanko, XISTA

For: Science entrepreneurs, aspiring cofounders, spinoffs in formation, pre-scaleups, and accelerator/entrepreneurship program managers.

Organised by: Konsultori & Vienna Spin-Off Project (AIT, BOKU, Medizinische Universität Wien, TU Wien, Universität Wien, WU Wien, Xista)
Sponsored by AWS.
