Moderated Networking with Lego and Small group discussions Innovation with Purpose Discover Startups and solutions solving the world's biggest challenges. THE CONTEXT Why Now? The Innovation Crisis We are racing toward "faster, bigger, newer." But startup founders, fintech innovators, and corporate leaders are building the future without upgrading the builders. The Reality: A growing burnout crisis shows that 72% of entrepreneurs experience mental health challenges, while AI advances exponentially and human capacity stays fundamentally unchanged. In an increasingly digitised and saturated world, this fuels a deeper hunger — a craving for genuine human connection that technology alone cannot replace. We need innovation with purpose. INSIDEOUT Summit is the conference to tackle that, part of the ViennaUP Festival. Join 300+ Purpose-Driven Innovators at the conference Who you will meet: We bring together the people building the future, not just talking about it. Our audience is built around startup founders: from purpose-driven builders tackling global challenges to fintech innovators reshaping how money moves. They are joined by ecosystem leaders from accelerators and the public sector, corporate innovators, impact investors and venture capital (VC) representatives actively looking for their next bet. A curated mix, built to foster connection and strategic partnerships. Part of the ViennaUP Festival. THE SOLUTION Key Topics Human 2.0 The go-to session for founders navigating burnout, peak performance, and sustainable leadership in 2026. Unlock inner growth, resilience, and neuroscience-backed strategies to meet the demands of today's fast-paced world. We believe that sustainable innovation starts with the individual; therefore, we build the builders, not just the tech. Join deep-dive sessions that explore the intersection of mental well-being and high performance to evolve your leadership from the inside out. Growth Unlocked Vienna's most direct conversation on startup funding, fintech partnerships, and the connections that unlock the next stage. Discover what actually breaks through — the partners, capital, and connections that turn stuck into scaling. Powered by Mastercard, founders — including fintech innovators reshaping how money moves — investors, and accelerators share the real moments that unlocked their growth. Join honest conversations about the decisions and relationships that turn potential into momentum. Purposeful Innovation Apply science, technology, and creativity to solve the world's biggest challenges rather than just following trends. This conference pillar is about discovering startups and solutions that truly matter for our collective future. From climate tech to deep science, we showcase how purposeful engineering can create systemic change while maintaining a focus on ethical and long-term impact. Authentic Connection Create honest, cross-sector relationships that go far beyond the surface-level networking of traditional conferences. From our interactive "Lego Serious Play" to moderated networking, we facilitate the social glue and psychological safety that make true innovation possible. Connect with a curated group of peers where vulnerability and radical honesty lead to real strategic partnerships. Why Join The Immersive Experience INSIDEOUT is more than a summit; it is a journey involving art, music, and deep dialogue to shift your perspective from the inside out. A conference that engages in all levels. Radical Collaboration Move beyond surface-level networking. We facilitate the "glue" that makes innovation possible through authentic, cross-sector relationships and unique interactive formats. This way, fintech and sustainable impact can come together in one place. Get access to others from the ViennaUP Festival. Future-Proof Leadership Unlock inner growth and neuroscience-backed strategies to meet the demands of today’s world by learning with pannels, talks and workshops. We focus on building the builders, not just the technology. Understanding how others succeeded so that you can grow. title: International Blockchain Day: The New Money: Stablecoins, Crypto, CBDC and the Power of Tokenization
descriptionFull:
International Blockchain Day – The New Money

The global financial system is entering a new era. At International Blockchain Day, we explore how stablecoins, crypto assets, CBDCs and tokenization are redefining money, markets and value creation. From policy and infrastructure to real-world adoption, the event connects leaders from finance, technology, regulation and the real economy to shape what comes next.

Stream 1 – Global Developments and Lessons for Europe
Discover how international markets are evolving, what regulatory frameworks are emerging, and which global use cases Europe can learn from to stay competitive in digital finance.

Stream 2 – Stablecoins: Powering the Next Financial System
Stablecoins are becoming the backbone of on-chain finance. This stream dives into payments, settlement, compliance, infrastructure and the role of stablecoins in the future monetary system.

Stream 3 – Digital Assets as an Investment Class – The New Money in Motion
From tokenization to institutional adoption, explore how digital assets are transforming portfolios, capital markets and investment strategies.

Stablecoins, crypto, CBDCs, and tokenization are no longer experiments — they are becoming the architecture of tomorrow’s financial system. International Blockchain Day convenes a curated circle of decision-makers from banking, asset management, policy, start ups and scale ups and technology to shape how digital assets will transform markets, capital, and global money flows. We are bringing together an outstanding lineup of speakers from institutions such as Visa, Moody’s, J.P. Morgan, Accenture, Clearstream, alongside leading industry voices including Yat Siu (Animoca Brands Hon Kong), Mohammed Al Fardan Al Fardan Corporation W.L.L./Dubai top exchanges, Banks. check out the website of the Global Digital Asset Forum Vienna 2026 : https://www.global-digital-asset-forum.com/ Agenda Across three invitation-level streams, we explore what truly matters: Stream 1 – Global Developments & Lessons for Europe Insights from leading financial hubs and regulators on how Europe can position itself at the forefront of digital finance. Stream 2 – Stablecoins: Powering the Next Financial System From institutional payments to market infrastructure — stablecoins as the strategic layer of the next financial era. Stream 3 – Digital Assets as an Investment Class – The New Money in Motion How sophisticated investors, funds, and institutions are integrating tokenized assets into modern portfolios. title: Corporate Venturing Summit
descriptionFull:
REINVENT OR DECLINE - How can corporations transform and grow in challenging times?

We will kick off the Corporate Venturing Summit with a series of engaging fishbowl sessions designed to turn insight into action: Strategy & Setup (making smart choices about where to play and how to win), Reinvent & Transform (rewiring the core to stay relevant and competitive), and Build & Grow (creating new businesses that can succeed beyond the core).

In the evening, we’ll explore how to build a "Reinvention Engine" that leverages simplicity, AI, and new technologies as a core capability. We’ll then dive into a C-level discussion on moving from research to innovation to implementation - and what commonly goes wrong in corporate setups.

The day wraps up with networking over dinner and drinks.

Learn more Set the Right Framework We build the foundation for innovation to scale – an innovation setup with clear governance, lean processes, smart KPIs, empowered teams, and a culture that actually moves ideas forward with speed and focus. Learn more Enable Fast Execution We use innovative methods and processes from the startup space for quick validation and scaling – taking a hands-on, results-driven approach that turns ideas into measurable impact. Learn more Success in Numbers 10+ Years of corporate strategy and innovation consulting experience 500+ Corporate innovation projects carried out 300+ Clients successfully consulted 20+ Countries where projects were delivered References Energy Enable & Mobilize: The Platform Bridging Strategy and Startup Innovation OMV Sphere helps OMV turn strategic sustainability and business challenges into startup collaborations by tapping into external innovation ecosystems. The platform has delivered five research and scouting projects, including reusable e-commerce packaging, sustainable products from spent coffee grounds, and green fuel certificates for aviation. Reinvent & Transform: Reliable Drone Inspections Beyond GNSS Limits An automated drone survey solution enables consistent dam inspections through AI-based navigation and tracking, even in GNSS-denied environments. Pilot trials with Skydio and Dronemajor show its potential to replace manual flights with safer, more reliable, and automated inspection workflows. Reinvent & Transform: Online Monitoring for Variable Frequency Drives ENI assessed non-intrusive technologies for real-time monitoring of Variable Frequency Drives to enable early anomaly detection and predictive insights. The initiative identified Electrical Signature Analysis as the most suitable approach and narrowed a highly specialized market to a focused set of leading providers. Strategy & Setup: Professionalizing Innovation to Power the Green Tech Transition Burgenland Energie professionalized its innovation system to support its transformation into a Green Tech player. The initiative defined an innovation vision, created transparency across ideas and partnerships, established clear processes and decision criteria, and set up a dedicated sandbox team. Grow & Build: Vehicle-to-Grid: Turning EVs into Grid Assets A Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) solution enables electric vehicles to feed energy back into the grid through bidirectional charging, trading platform access, and AI-based optimization. Successful pilots show how EVs can serve as flexible grid assets, helping operators like Moon Porsche balance the grid and unlock new revenue streams. Reinvent & Transform: Advancing Structural Integrity Monitoring for Oil & Gas Assets To address the high cost, risk, and limited visibility of periodic structural integrity inspections for onshore and offshore assets, ENI assessed and implemented advanced structural integrity technologies, thereby reducing scaffolding, downtime, and human exposure in hazardous environments. Reinvent & Transform: Laying the Foundation for Scalable Carbon Capture OMV sharpened its CCUS strategy by assessing how direct carbon capture can support low-carbon hydrocarbon production. A comprehensive market analysis translated this into strategic options and investment hypotheses, guiding plans to scale CO₂ storage and partnerships across the North Sea, Central and Eastern Europe, and the Middle East. Strategy & Setup: Wertstatt 8: Inventing the Future of Energy from Within Energie AG Oberösterreich built Wertstatt8 as a corporate venture studio to drive venture building and spin-off creation beyond its core utility business. The initiative developed and scaled new energy ventures, including Linus for data-driven energy optimization and E-Fairteiler for community-based solar power sharing. Reinvent & Transform: Reducing Wind Turbine Downtime Through Predictive AI Resulting from the need to reduce wind turbine downtime and maintenance costs, VERBUND piloted an AI-based predictive maintenance solution to anticipate component failures and improve maintenance planning. Grow & Build: Advancing Energy Ideas Through Venture Building OMV used the cross-company venture building format Pioneers.Peak to turn exploration beyond its core business into validated new opportunities. In a three-month program, OMV developed and tested concepts in energy storage, biomass utilization, and CO₂ certificate management, leading to C-level backing and the handover of two validated concepts. Grow & Build: From Idea to Market-Ready Energy Venture TTTech and VERBUND established a clear foundation for a joint corporate venture in high-end, grid-serving energy management by sharpening market focus, customer segments, and competitive positioning. The collaboration resulted in a defined business model, clear USPs, and a concrete go-to-market and launch roadmap. Enable & Mobilize: Venture Clienting as an Engine for Energy Innovation VERBUND used venture clienting to connect industry leaders with startups and implement innovative technologies across the organization. The program turned business challenges into 29 pilot projects with 22 corporate partners in areas such as energy management, AI-based market intelligence, predictive maintenance, and digital process control. Reinvent & Transform: Energy Management App Verbund Energy for Customer (VEC) reshaped their digital customer interface based on a thorough market analysis and customer survey by designing a new end-customer app in order to create transparency under existing contracts and act as a channel for direct communication and information. Reinvent & Transform: AI-Based Market Intelligence for Energy Trading VERBUND and YUKKA Lab implemented an AI solution to increase transparency in energy price movements by linking intraday, day-ahead, and futures prices with news, market data, and regulatory developments. Following a successful pilot, the tool was permanently integrated, enabling more informed trading and market decisions. Reinvent & Transform: AI-Based Load Management and Forecasting for Smart Charging SMATRICS and Ogre.AI optimized charging point utilization and energy costs by implementing an AI-based load management solution enabling real-time monitoring, forecasting, and load shifting, thereby strengthening smart charging capabilities across operations. Financial Services & Insurance Reinvent & Transform: Scaling Fintech Innovation Through Open Collaboration Visa used the Visa Everywhere Initiative to identify and scale high-potential fintech solutions addressing challenges such as NFC and digital payments, API-based money transfers, supply-chain visibility, and exponential technologies. The program attracted 100+ high-quality startups annually across Europe and APAC. Reinvent & Transform: Goodbye Paper Receipts, Hello Digital Clarity A major German bank introduced Digital Receipts, allowing customers to receive their receipts directly in the banking app after paying in-store. The solution simplifies expense tracking and returns and gives customers instant, organized access to their purchase history in one central place. title: Longevity Business Forum
descriptionFull:
The Longevity Business Forum is a premier event bringing together global leaders from science, healthcare, technology, and investment to explore how we can extend not just lifespan — but healthspan.

Hosted in Vienna, the forum serves as a meeting point for researchers, entrepreneurs, and policymakers committed to building a thriving longevity ecosystem. Through expert discussions, startup pitches, and an innovation award, the event highlights the latest breakthroughs transforming the way we age.

Startseite Über Uns Community Business Forum Speakers Agenda Startup Award 2026 Gallery 2026 Downloads Ressourcen Mitmachen Startseite Über Uns Community Business Forum Speakers Agenda Startup Award 2026 Gallery 2026 Downloads Ressourcen Mitmachen Gemeinsam die Zukunft der gesunden Langlebigkeit gestalten Wir sind die führende Community für Wissenschaft, Innovation und Lifestyle rund um gesunde Langlebigkeit. Werde Teil einer Bewegung, die Zukunft gestaltet. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden Warum Longevity Hub Austria? Die Forschung ist eindeutig: Wir können heute Einfluss auf unsere Lebensspanne und -qualität nehmen. Doch Wissen allein reicht nicht – wir brauchen Gemeinschaft, Inspiration und Umsetzung. Longevity Hub Austria ist der Ort, an dem kluge Köpfe, mutige Pionier:innen und Gesundheitsinteressierte zusammenkommen, um gesunde Langlebigkeit für alle möglich zu machen. Fakten, die bewegen: Mitglieder, Botschafter:innen, die mit uns lernen wollen 10+ Events im Jahr voller Impulse Starke Partner aus Wissenschaft & Praxis Jede Stimme, jede Idee zählt – gemeinsam schaffen wir Veränderung. Unsere Community Im Longevity Hub Austria triffst du auf Ärzt:innen, Forscher:innen, Unternehmer:innen, Biohacker:innen und Gesundheitsenthusiast:innen. Unterschiedliche Perspektiven – ein gemeinsames Ziel: Mehr gesunde Jahre, mehr Lebensqualität. Zur Community Events Unsere Veranstaltungen sind mehr als Vorträge – sie sind Erlebnisse, die Wissen lebendig machen. Hier lernst du direkt von internationalen Expert:innen, entdeckst neue Trends und baust Verbindungen auf, die dein Leben verändern können. Zu den Veranstaltungen Fragen & Antworten (FAQ) Was ist der Longevity Hub Austria? Der Longevity Hub Austria ist ein interdisziplinäres Netzwerk, das Forschung, Innovation und Gesundheitsinteressierte verbindet, um die gesunden Lebensjahre in Österreich zu verlängern und Langlebigkeit als gesellschaftliches und wirtschaftliches Thema zu etablieren. Warum wurde der Longevity Hub Austria gegründet? Weil die Lebenserwartung steigt, die gesunden Lebensjahre aber stagnieren. Es braucht neue Plattformen, die Wissenschaft, Unternehmen und Gesellschaft zusammenbringen, um Lösungen für Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit zu entwickeln. Was ist die Mission des Longevity Hub Austria? Wir schaffen ein inspirierendes Format rund um Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit – eine Plattform, die Menschen und Unternehmen verbindet und Österreich als führende Stimme für Langlebigkeit in Europa etabliert. Welche Themen stehen im Fokus? Von Medizin & Prävention über Ernährung, Fitness, Mental Health, Lifestyle & Wellness bis hin zu Biohacking, Wearables, Epigenetik, Unternehmensgesundheit und Forschung & Innovation. Was ist „Lonera“? Lonera ist die Community-Plattform des Longevity Hub Austria mit inspirierenden Events (Talks, Walks, Fest) Welche Events gibt es? Lonera Talk: Paneldiskussion mit Expert:innen aus Sport & Gesundheit. Lonera Walk: Gemeinsames 5 km-Walking „Speedy Walk“ in Wien und anderen Städten. Lonera Fest: Ein großes Lifestyle-Event mit Mitmach-Trainings, Vorträgen, Expo und dem Lonera Award. Wer kann Mitglied werden? Gesundheitsinteressierte, Unternehmen (klein, mittel, groß), Startups, Expert:innen sowie wissenschaftliche Institutionen. Welche Vorteile habe ich als Gründungsmitglied? Exklusives Netzwerk, Zugang zu allen Events, Networking mit Startups, Investor:innen und Forschung sowie „First Mover Advantage“. Wie kann ich Botschafter:in werden? Die das Thema Gesundheitsprävention glaubwürdig vertreten, aktiv mitgestalten und zur Sichtbarkeit des Netzwerks beitragen Welche Rolle spielt Forschung im Hub? Der Hub versteht sich als Brücke zwischen Wissenschaft und Praxis. Mitglieder haben Zugang zu internationalen Studien, Pilotprojekten und Innovationspartnerschaften und können eigene Forschungsthemen einbringen. Wie kann ich den Longevity Hub Austria erreichen? Erika Krizsan (Ecosystem Lead) 📞 +43 664 189 1810 📧 e.krizsan@longevityhub.at Die Zukunft der Gesundheit beginnt heute – und du kannst dabei sein. Werde Teil einer Community, die inspiriert, unterstützt und vorangeht. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden Longevity Hub Austria – die Community für gesunde Langlebigkeit. Gemeinsam mehr erreichen. Wir sind ein gemeinnütziger Verein mit dem Ziel, Menschen zu verbinden, gegenseitige Unterstützung zu fördern und einen positiven Beitrag für unsere Gemeinschaft zu leisten. title: ClawCon #2 - ViennaUP edition
location: Prisma by Lumia, Am Grünen Prater 2, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
For space lobsters, humans, and everything in between
The Claw is back and proud to be an official part of ViennaUP! Join us for a high-energy evening dedicated to the OpenClaw movement—the world’s fastest-growing open-source AI agent ecosystem. Whether you’re a builder, a hacker, or just "Claw-curious," this is the hub for the new Agent Economy.
What’s on the Agenda?

  • Lightning Talks @ 5 Mins: No boring PowerPoints. Just raw, 5-minute demos of the coolest and weirdest use cases—from autonomous home setups to AI-driven "vibe coding" projects that run 24/7.
  • Community over Corporate: Experience the "lobster" atmosphere where technical fails are celebrated, and "how did you build that?" is the only question that matters.
  • Meet The New Agentic Hub: Hosted by Lumia, your dedicated space for the agent economy.

Don’t miss the ViennaUP edition of the world's most creative AI meetup and take the chance to connect with the builders shaping the future of decentralized AI.

title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for honest conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

FREE TICKET Description Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026 : invitation-style round tables where selected startups meet experienced investors and innovation managers for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward. After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. The application will be open until the 4th of May 11:00 am. We will get back to you after the application deadline. When applying, please select your preferred host and briefly share your traction, goals, and what you want to discuss at the table. title: Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
descriptionFull:
Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
22 May | 09:00–12:00 | ViennaUP
Hosted by Calm/Storm x WU Ignite Ventures


A relaxed morning for the next generation of builders in Austria. Founders & Future Founders Breakfast brings together early-stage founders, operators, students, and ambitious minds who are either already building — or seriously thinking about it.


Hosted as part of ViennaUP by Calm/Storm and WU Ignite, this session is about honest conversations around going from 0 → 1. No pitch stage, no panels for show just practical insights, real experiences, and space to connect with others at a similar stage.

What to expect:

  • Short founder and investor insights on getting started
  • Practical perspectives on early traction, funding, and mistakes
  • Open Q&A and networking with peers
  • A room full of people who are building, or about to

WU Ignite Ventures backs founders at day zero. Calm/Storm invests early in ambitious teams building in digital health. Together, we want to create a space where ideas can turn into action.

Join our community of founders supporting founders, finding calm during the storm. ‍ Calm/Storm - a boutique venture capital firm Purpose We invest in purpose driven founders changing our life, health and wellbeing for the better. We focus on HealthTech including "digital health" and "well-being", prevention and care, B2B and B2C startups. We have an outstanding track-record, named #1 HealthTech investor in Europe since 2020. Our aim is to create both, impact and financial returns. Our portfolio spans from fertility, to AI enabled infrastructure, from mental health issues to clinical decision support, from insurtech to chronic constipation, from SaaS tools for HCPs to taboo topics that everyone could encounter at some point in life. title: Creative Catalyst Aperture
descriptionFull:
What does it take to bring a creative business to European scale?

Aperture is the launch of Creative Catalyst Austria, an innovation pathway programme for Austrian creative businesses moving beyond borders, designed to push creative businesses beyond local markets and into European scale, through tailored innovation and growth pathways.

The day traces the Creative Catalyst journey from provocation and foresight to hands-on collaboration. The morning is dedicated to talks from practitioners working at the intersection of materials and creative technology, perspectives that highlight emerging shifts shaping Europe's creative economy, and where creative businesses can position themselves within it.

In the afternoon, the focus turns to application. Participants take part in smaller sessions with members of the Creative Catalyst network: coaches, investors, and industry experts working directly with businesses on their next steps. Alongside these sessions, participants can also learn more about current opportunities from EIT Culture & Creativity and explore how to engage with upcoming programmes and funding calls.

Tickets MORNING: Welcome + Talks Join us for our morning session (9:00- 13:00) full of inspiring insights from industry experts and creatives working across the creative sector. FREE TICKET Additional Tickets Only available with the purchase of at least one mandatory ticket. AFTERNOON: Mentoring Sessions & Eu Funding Updates for Partners In the afternoon, we offer both a program partner workshop as well as mentoring sessions developed by Morningsloth: For program partners, we offer a focus session (Track A) around European Funding updates and mutual exchange, led by EU funding experts Jan Vincent Jordan and others. For Program prospects, we offer smaller sessions with mentors (Track B) of the Creative Catalyst network: coaches, investors, and industry experts working directly with them on their next steps and answering burning questions that arise. Through these sessions, participants can also learn more about current opportunities from EIT Culture & Creativity and explore how to engage with upcoming programs and funding calls that fit their trajectories. When selecting this ticket, please indicate which track you will be part of. FREE TICKET Description What does it take to bring a creative business to European scale? Aperture is the launch of Creative Catalyst Austria, an innovation and growth pathway programme for Austrian creative businesses extending themselves beyond borders. The program is specifically designed to grow existing creative businesses beyond local markets, into European scale. This event gives you a preview of the Creative Catalyst and the journeys it offers: from fruitful provocations, industry insights and foresight, all the way to collaboration building, networking and individual mentoring. The morning is dedicated to talks from industry experts working at the intersection of materials and creative technology, such as industry and innovation expert Elsa Parente of Positive Materials , autonomous system expert Joanna Bakas of Frontira , Brand Developer Claudia Chmielowiec of BioFluff , as well as designer and material scientist Charles Gateau of Studio LoopLoop . They will share their perspectives and experiences on emerging shifts within Europe's creative economy, and how creative businesses can position themselves within them. In the afternoon, the focus turns to engagement and connection with a programme partner workshop and mentoring sessions developed by Morningsloth : For programme partners, we offer a focus session around European Funding updates and mutual exchange, led by EU funding experts Jan Vincent Jordan , and others. For programme prospects, we offer smaller sessions with mentors of the Creative Catalyst network: coaches, investors, and industry experts working directly with them on their next steps and answering burning questions that arise. Through these sessions, participants can also learn more about current opportunities from EIT Culture & Creativity and explore how to engage with upcoming programmes and funding calls that fit their trajectories. We kindly invite all participants to join us to a session of Boule and drinks after the event. title: Open House @AI Factory Austria AI:AT
descriptionFull:
Yes, we are open! The AI Factory Austria AI:AT opens the doors of its brand new Innovation Center and Coworking Space during ViennaUP for startups, scale-ups and innovation-driven companies, who want to experience practical, hands-on AI!

From 9:30 AM to 04:00 PM you can visit our space, talk to our consultants about our services or participate in one of our free workshops:

  • AI Opportunity Sprint (10:00 AM-11:30 AM) - Identify and prioritize real AI use cases for your startup, including impact/effort scoring and next steps.
  • Build Your First AI Agent (1:00 PM–2:30 PM) - Create a simple AI agent or automation workflow you can immediately test and use.
  • How to Trustworthy AI (3:00 PM–4:00 PM) - A clear, practical overview of EU AI Act, GDPR and ethical AI - no legal background required.

Join us where the future of AI lives! Registration for Open House and workshops is required.

❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 24 seats.

✨ As a small extra incentive, workshop participants will receive a surprise goodie bag ✨

title: WSA Community Day
location: Vienna Business Agency, Mariahilfer Straße 20, 1070 Vienna
descriptionFull:
On the final day of the WSA Global Congress, participants can dive deeper into the topics most relevant to their work with the offer of multiple workshops at the Impact Founders Lab – Tools for Scaling Your Startup. Designed for impact entrepreneurs and tech startups, this hands-on workshop series hosted at the Vienna Business Agency provides practical tools to strengthen your business while staying true to your mission, focusing on real founder challenges.

 

Included workshops:

  • 9:30-10:30
    How to Develop an AI Strategy for Your Business
    Deep Dive Workshop by Odeta Iseviciute, Change AI, Lithuania.
  • 10:30-11:30
    Why Measuring Your Impact Matters and How to Start
    Deep Dive Workshop by Connor Sattely, Decile Group, Netherlands.
  • 11:30-14:00
    Playful Problem-Solving for Startups
    Hands-on, minds-on LEGO brick-based workshop by Caspar Aarlit Jensen, Pressplay, Denmark. Designed to strengthen your ability to navigate challenges, pivot fast, and think creatively under pressure.
  • 14:00-15:00
    How to Scale in Cooperation with Vienna Business Agency
    Scaling Readiness, by Petra Wolkenstein and Michael Kubiena, Konsultori, Austria
    Fill out this form before: https://konsultori.typeform.com/to/v9QUPlfb?utm_source=event&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=VUP%20WSA

 

You can find our evolving and continually updated congress program HERE
For questions and further inquiry please contact office@wsa-global.org

Attendees exchanged ideas and LinkedIn profiles in the bustling Palais Wertheim, the shadow of the world’s oldest ferris wheel in Hotel Superbode, and the extravagant ballroom at Jugendstiltheater. The community showed up for each […] About Awards Mission UN Context WSIS Context Board WSA Team Contact FAQs Participate WSA Award Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Young Innovators Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Partner Awards Winners WSA Winners WSA ix3 Winners’ Stories Winners’ Impact Network National Experts National Experts Expert’s Corner Youth Community Youth Ambassadors Youth Community Jurors Speakers Patrons Partners Strategic Partners Hosting Partners Sponsoring Partners Media Partners Events Global Congress Jury Events EYIF UniVation Innovation Events Partner Events Media News & Events Press Releases Clippings Publications Newsletter WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet From May 19-22 the WSA Global Congress went back to its roots in Austria. Attendees exchanged ideas and LinkedIn profiles in the bustling Palais Wertheim, the shadow of the world's oldest ferris wheel in Hotel Superbode, and the extravagant ballroom at Jugendstiltheater. The community showed up for each other yet again behind the pitch deck podium and on the dance floor, proving that in this age of corporate consolidation, rampant inequality and AI incentivised layoffs; there is still enormous power in connection, global cooperation, and ethical innovation. As usual, the crowd was a diverse patchwork of faces, some familiar, some new, with representation from almost half of the 182 UN member states. What did this melting pot all have in common? Ambition, ingenuity and the drive to make the world a better place. Topics Agenda Winners Global Champions Key Participants Welcome statement Why Vienna Photos Partners Catalogue Topics Digital Sovereignty vs. AI | Control, Choice, Community Is it possible to have a conference in 2026 without talking about AI? That's a rhetorical question of course. But the WSA community didn't come all the way to Vienna to talk about increasing profit margins at the expense of the middle class. The more important questions were how to keep digital sovereignty, how to build these systems with integrity, and how to keep AI more inclusive. Global Impact Solutions | Built for Real Needs Impact startups are building the solutions we urgently need - tackling climate, inclusion, education, and health - but often struggle to gain funding and support in systems copying Silicon Valley standards. The community shared insider knowledge on how to level the playing field and support founders and their ventures, as well as how to create value for communities, not just shareholders. Building Digital Public Goods | Meeting Community Demands Digital public infrastructure provides access to services, opportunities and participation, however yet many communities, especially in rural or marginalized areas, remain excluded. When essential tools are privately owned or unevenly deployed, digital divides deepen. In this Global Congress, there were a lot of discussions on how to build shared digital foundations that are open, inclusive, ensuring everyone can benefit from and contribute to the digital future. Five tech giants shouldn’t define our digital lives, own our data and choices. It’s time to pause, reflect and reset. From May 19–22, 2026, Vienna proved that Digital without Harm is possible, welcoming 500+ changemakers from 90+ countries. Renowned for its commitment to digital humanism , the city offered the perfect backdrop to explore how technology can be ethical, inclusive, and human-centered. Set within ViennaUP , Central Europe’s largest startup and innovation festival, participants had access to a wide range of events, gatherings, and networking opportunities, connecting with innovators, policymakers, and impact-driven founders from around the world. Vienna is consistently ranked one of the most livable cities in the world, with excellent public transport, vibrant culture, historic architecture, and world-class food and coffee — the congress was the perfect occasion to finally (re)visit this city. title: { founders only }
descriptionFull:
{ founders only } is not just another conference. It’s a space for 250 startup founders who’ve lived the rollercoaster of building something real.

No pitching. No sales. Zero fluff.

Only growth and scale founders who’ve raised or earned €500k+, coming together for honest conversations about the ups and downs of the founder journey.

Through panel talks with exited and experienced founders, hands-on workshops, and genuine peer connections, this { founders only } event creates a founder-to-founder experience like no other. Learn directly from your peers and gain practical tools and proven strategies to scale sustainably, building stronger businesses with lasting success.

Expect raw insights, shared struggles, and personal breakthroughs around mental health, responsible leadership, and wealth that’s more than numbers.

This is where Europe’s growth and scale founders meet eye to eye, a chance to step out of the hustle and reconnect with purpose, balance, and people who truly get it.
